title: Chess in the Block
author: Sabino Pereira
description_en: Chess in the Block is a reflective book about survival, pressure, silence, family, love, loss, class, and maturity. Using chess as a metaphor for life on the block, each piece becomes a way to understand people who learned to survive before they learned how to dream.
subtitle_options: A book about survival, silence, and learning how to move without losing yourself
Life, survival, and the invisible strategies of the block
A story of pressure, pride, love, loss, and emotional survival
adaptation_note: This is not a direct translation of Xadrez no Comando. It is an English-language adaptation with an American urban context and a natural English voice.
